iotevents.alarmmodel.alarmcapabilities.C: Contains the configuration information of alarm state changes.

iotevents.alarmmodel.alarmcapabilities.A.Description: Specifies whether to get notified for alarm state changes.

iotevents.alarmmodel.alarmcapabilities.I.Description: Specifies the default alarm state. The configuration applies to all alarms that were created based on this alarm model.
